findings.description: Route protection is implemented client-side only using useEffect. This creates a brief window where protected content may flash before redirect.
findings.rootCause: Authentication guard uses useEffect + router.push pattern which runs after initial render. A fast network or cached response could expose protected routes momentarily.
findings.impact: Protected page content may briefly flash to unauthenticated users. Does not provide true server-side protection. Search engine crawlers could index protected content.
findings.recommendation: Implement server-side auth using Next.js middleware (middleware.ts) to redirect unauthenticated users before any content is served. Use Firebase Admin to verify tokens in middleware.

findings.description: Route protection is implemented client-side only using useEffect. This creates a brief window where protected content may flash before redirect.
findings.rootCause: Authentication guard uses useEffect + router.push pattern which runs after initial render. A fast network or cached response could expose protected routes momentarily.
findings.impact: Protected page content may briefly flash to unauthenticated users. Does not provide true server-side protection. Search engine crawlers could index protected content.
findings.recommendation: Implement server-side auth using Next.js middleware (middleware.ts) to redirect unauthenticated users before any content is served. Use Firebase Admin to verify tokens in middleware.

findings.description: Content Security Policy includes 'unsafe-inline' which allows inline scripts and styles.
findings.rootCause: CSP script-src or style-src contains 'unsafe-inline', weakening XSS protections.
findings.impact: Inline script injection is possible. Reduces effectiveness of CSP as an XSS mitigation layer.
findings.recommendation: Use nonce-based or hash-based CSP instead of 'unsafe-inline'. Implement Next.js nonce generation for inline scripts.

findings.description: API call to backend does not include an Authorization header. Backend endpoints may lack authentication.
findings.rootCause: fetch() to backend API_BASE_URL without attaching Firebase ID token in Authorization header.
findings.impact: Backend endpoints may be publicly accessible without authentication. User data could be accessed without proper authorization.
findings.recommendation: Attach Firebase ID token to all authenticated API requests: 'Authorization: Bearer ' + await user.getIdToken(). Verify token in backend middleware.

depFindings.description: Verify this is the latest stable Next.js version. Check https://nextjs.org/blog for security advisories.
depFindings.recommendation: Run 'npm audit' and update to the latest stable version of next.

depFindings.description: Firebase SDK version should be kept current. Check Firebase release notes for security patches.
depFindings.recommendation: Run 'npm audit' and update to the latest stable version of firebase.

depFindings.description: brace-expansion: brace-expansion: DoS via exponential-time expansion of consecutive non-expanding {} groups, brace-expansion: DoS via exponential-time expansion of consecutive non-expanding {} groups
depFindings.recommendation: Run 'npm audit fix' or update brace-expansion to the fixed version.

depFindings.description: js-yaml: js-yaml: YAML merge-key chains can force quadratic CPU consumption
depFindings.recommendation: Run 'npm audit fix' or update js-yaml to the fixed version.
Run 'npm audit fix' or update next to the fixed version.

depFindings.description: postcss: PostCSS has XSS via Unescaped </style> in its CSS Stringify Output
depFindings.recommendation: Run 'npm audit fix' or update postcss to the fixed version.

depFindings.description: protobufjs: protobufjs: Denial of Service via infinite loop in .proto option parsing
depFindings.recommendation: Run 'npm audit fix' or update protobufjs to the fixed version.

depFindings.description: sharp: sharp inherited vulnerabilities in libvips: CVE-2026-33327, CVE-2026-33328, CVE-2026-35590, CVE-2026-35591
depFindings.recommendation: Run 'npm audit fix' or update sharp to the fixed version.

Remove Firebase keys from source code
Add Authorization headers to API calls
